---
name: Provider request
about: Request support for a new LLM provider
title: "[provider] "
labels: provider, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Provider name**
e.g. Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Google Vertex, Mistral

**Why this provider?**
What use case or audience does it unlock?

**SDK / API reference**
Link to the provider's Python SDK or API docs.

**Are you willing to implement it?**
- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] No, requesting for the community
